The question was likely:  
**"What is the name of the prophet mentioned in the first verse of the Book of Obadiah, and what is the first word of each sentence in the text?"**  

This question asks for two pieces of information:  
1. The name of the prophet attributed to the Book of Obadiah.  
2. The first word of each sentence in the text, which is stated to be "impression."
